description_long: This is an adult male figure with a muscular build, standing upright with arms relaxed at the sides. He is dressed in a fitted short-sleeve shirt and straight-cut pants, both of which appear casual and suitable for everyday urban environments. The figure's posture is neutral, with weight evenly distributed on both legs, and the head is slightly tilted forward. The shoes are low-profile and athletic in style, suggesting comfort for walking. The hairstyle is short and closely cropped, with a slight taper at the sides. No accessories or carried objects are visible, and the overall appearance is that of a typical city pedestrian.
description: A muscular adult male pedestrian in casual short-sleeve shirt and pants, standing upright with short hair and athletic shoes.
description_view_0: Rear view showing broad shoulders, muscular arms, and relaxed stance.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the head, arm, and straight leg posture.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to view 0, with a slightly different angle showing the back and both arms.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the head, arm, and leg, with clear definition of the figure's build.
attribute_clothing_type: casual short-sleeve shirt and straight-cut pants
